event_blocks.summary: The 'Celebrity Family Feud' season premiere features a face-off between the 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' teams, both playing for Children's Hospital Los Angeles. The stage is set with vibrant blue and orange lighting, circular backdrops, and a central platform displaying the show's logo. The Host, Steve Harvey, energetically welcomes the teams, announcing they are playing for $25,000. He introduces the WEST team, including Kanye West, Khloé Kardashian, Kourtney Kardashian, and others. Kanye West, in a black zip-up jacket, confirms everyone is a fan of the show and thanks the Host. The Host then introduces the KARDASHIAN team, featuring Kim Kardashian with braided hair, Kris Jenner in a black outfit with a cross necklace, and Kendall Jenner in a brown blazer. The Host acknowledges Kim Kardashian's ventures and congratulates her on her third child. Kim expresses her deep fandom for 'Family Feud,' stating it's all they watch. Kanye adds humorously, "Got to have a feud." Kanye then introduces his cousin, Kim Wallace, his cousin Jalil (an architect), and his cousin Ricky (an A&R for a record label). The Host continues introductions, addressing Jalil and Ricky, who share their professions. Kris Jenner, smiling, is seen clapping alongside Kendall Jenner. The Host then introduces Mary Jo (MJ), Kris Jenner's mother, who is playing in tandem with Kris. Kris Jenner introduces her daughter, Khloé Kardashian, who expresses excitement and playfully challenges Kim, stating, "Kim, I got you."

Audience.description: A large, engaged crowd seated around the stage, clapping, cheering, and laughing in response to the host and teams.

Khloé Kardashian.description: A woman with long blonde hair, wearing a black sleeveless dress, standing beside Kanye West, smiling and clapping. She speaks with an excited tone, expressing her readiness for the 'feud' and mentioning her sister Kim.

Kanye West.description: A man in a black zip-up jacket, standing confidently behind a podium on the WEST team, smiling and clapping during the host’s introduction.

Kris Jenner.description: A woman with short dark hair, wearing a black outfit with a cross necklace, standing in the center of the KARDASHIAN team, smiling and clapping. She interjects a comment about getting it from somewhere and clearly introduces Khloé Kardashian.

Kendall Jenner.description: A woman with dark hair, wearing a brown blazer over a light top, standing on the far right of the KARDASHIAN team, arms crossed and smiling.

Host.description: A bald man with a mustache, wearing a gray suit and tie, standing center stage, gesturing and speaking to the teams with energy. He has an enthusiastic and clear voice, introducing guests, making jokes, and expressing admiration for Mary Jo.

Stage Design.description: A modern game show set with vibrant blue and orange lighting, circular backdrops with team names ('WEST', 'KARDASHIAN'), and a central platform with the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo, all illuminated with dynamic spotlights and LED effects.

Kim Kardashian.description: A woman with braided hair, wearing a black long-sleeve top, standing on the KARDASHIAN team, smiling and looking down at her podium.

Kourtney Kardashian.description: A woman with curly dark hair, wearing a beige crop top and matching pants, standing on the KARDASHIAN team, adjusting her hair and smiling.

NewEntity1.description: A man with braided hair, wearing a black sweatshirt and a silver necklace with a nameplate, standing on the far right of the WEST team, smiling and laughing.

raw_segments: The video opens with a darkened stage, quickly transitioning to a vibrant 'Celebrity Family Feud' set, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting and large circular backdrops. Upbeat game show music plays as an announcer declares, "It's the season premiere of your favorite summer show," introducing the "Kardashians versus the West family." The announcer then exclaims, "It's time for Celebrity Family Feud! It's the face-off we've all been waiting for!" He identifies the "Kim and Kanye West and family" team, playing for Children's Hospital Los Angeles, and states they are "taking on the Kardashians," who are also playing for the same hospital. Two teams, labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN,' stand behind podiums with microphones. The WEST team includes Kanye West, a man in a black jacket, Khloé Kardashian with long blonde hair, Kourtney Kardashian with curly hair in a beige outfit, and two other men. The KARDASHIAN team features Kim Kardashian with braided hair, Kris Jenner in a black outfit with a cross necklace, Kendall Jenner in a brown blazer, and another woman in a green dress. The announcer then builds anticipation, declaring, "And now, the star of our show, Steve Harvey!" The audience erupts in loud cheers and applause as the Host, a bald man with a mustache in a sharp gray suit, energetically walks center stage, gesturing and speaking with enthusiasm. He greets the audience and teams, saying, "Hey, Chris, what's up, darling?" likely to Kris Jenner, and expresses appreciation, "Appreciate y'all. Thank you very much." The stage design, with its central circular platform and show logo, along with bright spotlights and animated lighting, enhances the lively and celebratory game show atmosphere, further amplified by the continuous audience engagement.

The 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage bursts to life with dynamic blue and orange lighting, showcasing circular backdrops for the 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' teams. The Host, Steve Harvey, a bald man in a sharp gray suit, energetically welcomes everyone to the show, his voice clear and commanding, as the audience erupts in cheers and applause. He announces the families will be battling for $25,000 for charity, prompting another wave of enthusiastic applause and game show music swells. Steve then introduces 'The West Family,' leading to a massive roar from the audience. He approaches the WEST team, shaking hands with Kanye West, who is in a black zip-up jacket, and warmly engaging with Khloé Kardashian, in a black sleeveless dress. Steve humorously states, 'No introduction necessary. Yeezy,' referring to Kanye, who responds in a deep, calm voice, confirming he's 'good' and thanking Steve for the welcome. Kanye also confirms that everyone is a big fan of Family Feud. As Steve continues to interact, asking Kanye how he's been, Kanye replies, 'I've been good, you know,' and thanks Steve again for the compliment on his appearance. Steve then turns to Khloé, gesturing for an introduction, and she laughs playfully, adding to the lively atmosphere as Kourtney Kardashian, in a beige crop top, smiles and adjusts her hair in the background.

The video opens on the 'Celebrity Family Feud' set, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting and featuring circular backdrops with team names and a central platform displaying the show's logo. The Host, a bald man in a gray suit and tie, energetically engages with the WEST team. He gestures toward Kanye West, a man in a black zip-up jacket, who smiles broadly and claps as he introduces his "beautiful wife Kim Kardashian West." The Host, speaking with a distinct, charismatic voice, greets Kim, acknowledging her beauty fragrance line, executive producer role for Glam Masters, and congratulating her on her third child born in January, which is met with applause. Kim, whose voice is heard, thanks the Host and declares herself the "biggest Family Feud fan," explaining that watching it is "all we do every single night." Kanye, speaking calmly, adds, "Got to have a feud," eliciting laughter. The Host continues to interact with the team, drawing more laughter and smiles. The camera cuts to close-ups of Khloé Kardashian, with long blonde hair in a black sleeveless dress, beaming with a wide smile, and then to Kourtney Kardashian, with curly dark hair in a beige crop top, also smiling and adjusting her hair. The Host then prompts Kanye to introduce more team members. Kanye introduces his "beautiful cousin, Kim Wallace," followed by "my cousin Jalil," who is seen as a man with braided hair in a black sweatshirt and a silver nameplate necklace, grinning and laughing. Finally, Kanye introduces "my cousin Ricky." The lively and playful atmosphere is punctuated by frequent applause and laughter from the audience and team members, with all visibly enjoying the moment.

The segment opens with a close-up of Kanye West, Khloé Kardashian, and another man (NewEntity1) on the WEST team, all smiling and clapping as the energetic Host, a bald man in a gray suit with a mustache, gestures toward them, declaring, "So let's just get it on!" The camera then pulls back to reveal the full, vibrant stage of 'Celebrity Family Feud,' illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting, circular backdrops labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN,' and the central platform featuring the show's logo. Game show music swells as the Host moves to the KARDASHIAN team, exclaiming, "Let's go meet the Kardashian family!" to a burst of audience cheers and applause. He greets Kris Jenner, a woman with short dark hair in a black outfit with a cross necklace, shaking her hand and warmly saying, "Hello, darling." Kris, smiling, responds, "How are you?" The Host introduces her as "the matriarch, Kris Jenner," highlighting her role as the "momager" who "manages the careers of all six of her children" and is the "executive producer of Keeping Up With The Kardashians," drawing more applause and reactions from the audience. Kris lightheartedly confirms, "They keep me busy. They keep me hopping around here," and shares a friendly exchange with the Host about his wife, Marjorie, saying, "Love Marjorie. So beautiful." She expresses her excitement to be there, "Good, really good. So excited to be here." The Host then addresses the entire KARDASHIAN team, which includes Kim Kardashian, Kendall Jenner, and Kourtney Kardashian, pointing and speaking with enthusiasm, noting, "you've never seen this before, one, two, three, four, five, six people over here," referring to the expanded team. He jokes about a "family feud backstage" that "couldn't settle it," eliciting laughter from the audience. As the Host stands center stage, gesturing with emphasis, the team members listen attentively, occasionally smiling or nodding, while the dynamic stage lighting with spotlights and LED effects enhances the lively atmosphere. The segment concludes with Kris Jenner introducing, "This is my beautiful mother," as the Host prepares to introduce the "real star of the show."

The segment opens with a close-up of Kim Kardashian, smiling warmly with her braided hair styled in two thick plaits, wearing a black long-sleeve top, as the host introduces "Mary Jo, who we call MJ." The camera then pans to Kanye West and Khloé Kardashian, both standing behind their podiums, clapping and smiling, while the audience erupts in cheers and applause. The scene shifts to the KARDASHIAN team, where Kris Jenner, in a black outfit with a cross necklace, and a woman with short brown hair are seen laughing and engaging with the host. The host, a bald man in a gray suit with a mustache, gestures animatedly as he speaks, leaning on the podium and interacting with the teams, explaining that "Mary Jo is playing in tandem with Kris." He humorously adds that he doesn't need to explain why she's on the show, as "she was not not gonna be on the show," eliciting laughter and applause from the audience. He expresses his admiration for Mary Jo, saying, "Oh my god, you're my favorite," and recounts how he insisted she be on TV. Kris Jenner interjects, "we all get it from somewhere," to which the host agrees. The host then asks Kris to "introduce everybody." Kris, with a clear voice, introduces "my third oldest child, Khloé Kardashian," prompting a massive cheer and applause from the audience. The host then asks Khloé, "So how you been?" Khloé, with an excited tone, replies, "Good. Yeah, I'm excited to be here. We've been fighting, you know? I'm ready for this feud, me and Kim. Kim, I got you." Wide shots of the stage reveal the full lineup under dynamic blue and orange lighting, with circular backdrops displaying team names and a central platform featuring the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo. On the WEST team, Kanye West, Khloé Kardashian, and a man with braided hair in a black sweatshirt (NewEntity1) are visible; on the KARDASHIAN team, Kim Kardashian, Kris Jenner, and the woman with short brown hair are present, all engaged in the lively and celebratory game show atmosphere.

event_blocks.summary: On the 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage, bathed in dynamic blue and orange lighting, the Host energetically introduces Kendall Jenner, praising her as '2017's highest paid model in the world!' eliciting cheers. Khloé Kardashian, Kris Jenner, and Kim Kardashian are present with the KARDASHIAN team, while Kanye West leads the WEST team. The game begins with the question, 'We asked 100 women. Name a reason you think Steve Harvey's a good kisser.' Kanye West answers 'Lips,' stating, 'I'm here to win.' Khloé suggests, 'because you're tall,' and Kourtney Kardashian interjects, 'You have that sexy bald head,' drawing significant audience laughter and applause. Later, Kanye West offers 'Swag,' which the Host enthusiastically accepts. Kanye West then suggests 'The mustache, Steve,' which the Host acknowledges as a valid reason, noting its effectiveness. The scoreboard shows 'MASSIVE FISH LIPS' with 70 points and 'HE'S SEXY' with 12 points, with the KARDASHIAN team having two strikes.

event_blocks.summary: The 'Celebrity Family Feud' segment opens with the Host, Steve Harvey, a bald man in a gray suit, energetically engaging the KARDASHIAN and WEST teams on a vibrant stage bathed in blue and orange lighting. The game board displays scores and answers, accompanied by upbeat game show music and enthusiastic audience cheers. Harvey interacts with Kris Jenner, Kim Kardashian, Khloé Kardashian, Kendall Jenner, and Kourtney Kardashian, as well as Kanye West and other contestants. Early in the game, answers like 'MASSIVE FISH LIPS' and 'HE'S SEXY' are shown, followed by 'HE'S KIND' and 'LOTS OF PRACTICE'. The Host poses questions such as, "We asked 100 women, name an occasion when you slip into something sexy instead of comfortable," receiving answers like 'Date night,' 'Your anniversary,' 'Brunch,' 'Her boyfriend's birthday,' 'Valentine's Day,' 'New Year's Eve,' 'When you want something special,' and 'Honeymoon.' event_blocks.summary: The Host, a bald man in a gray suit, energetically welcomes the WEST and KARDASHIAN teams to 'Celebrity Family Feud,' with Kanye West in a black zip-up jacket, Kim Kardashian in a black sleeveless top with long silver-blonde hair, Kourtney Kardashian in a green sleeveless top, and NewEntity1 in a black sweatshirt on the WEST team, and Khloé Kardashian with braided hair, Kris Jenner, and a woman with short brown hair on the KARDASHIAN team. Upbeat game show music plays as the Host greets them, moving between podiums and playfully interacting with Khloé Kardashian. Kendall Jenner and a woman with long blonde hair are also present. The Host thanks the West family for a contribution to their foundation. The modern game show set features vibrant blue and orange lighting, circular 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' backdrops, and a central 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo, with the audience clapping and cheering. The Host announces they will play Fast Money, noting everyone is nervous. A significant announcement is made: for the first time in Family Feud history, Khloé reveals that she and Kendall are letting Kim and Kanye play Fast Money for the same charity, as Kim and Kanye were 'dying to do this.' Kanye West and Kim West are then confirmed to play Fast Money. Kim expresses nervousness, having practiced in her bedroom. Kim, playing for the Children's Hospital Los Angeles, states she hopes not to do poorly as the charity needs it. The Host explains the game: five questions in 20 seconds, with a target of 200 points. Kim enthusiastically states she is playing for $25,000 for the Children's Hospital Los Angeles. The game begins with Kim answering questions rapidly, including 'Ten' for how sexy she is compared to colleagues, 'Your butt' for a body part often bumped into things, 'Pie' for 'slice of what?', 'Running in the wheel' for a hamster's activity, and 'Milk' for a milkshake ingredient. The Host humorously resets a question when stunned by her answer. Kanye West then plays Fast Money, needing 53 points to win $25,000 for his charity. He answers questions, sometimes prompted with 'Try again,' with responses like 'Ten,' 'Five,' 'Your knee,' 'Bread,' 'Being on a spinning wheel,' 'Eating,' 'Milk,' and 'Ice cream.' The scoreboard shows Kim's answers totaling 147 points. The Host reveals that Kim and Kanye had the number one answers for several categories, including 'Leg and knee,' 'Pie,' 'Running on the wheel,' and 'Milk,' contributing to a final score of 168, securing the $25,000 for the Children's Hospital of Los Angeles. The teams celebrate with hugs and laughter.
